name: latticework seed, off-topic probe → noise-floor abstains
description: Same near-tie seed as scenarios 01/02, but the probe is deliberately off-topic (cooking/baking prose). Cosine against both candidate ACs is well below the 0.45 noise floor (0.20 and 0.16 at fixture-authoring time), so the gate must abstain and the default affinity order survives.
notes: Same-session authorship; needs second-reader review. Gate FIRES (we enter the ε window since affinities are near-tied), but the noise-floor guard prevents the swap. Default affinity order survives.
